mnemonics.title: OpenMP Trapezoidal Steps
mnemonics.content: FORD: Fork threads, compute Over loop, Reduce partial sums, Done (join). The fork-join model of OpenMP trapezoidal rule.

mnemonics.title: Trapezoidal Rule Formula
mnemonics.content: HALF-ENDS: The first and last function values get Half weight; all interior points get full weight. Multiply everything by h.

mnemonics.title: Reduction Clause Behavior
mnemonics.content: PIC: Private copies, Independent accumulation, Combined at end. Each thread gets its own copy, works independently, then OpenMP sums them all.

mnemonics.title: Three OpenMP Approaches
mnemonics.content: RCM (from best to worst): Reduction clause (best), Critical-once with manual decomposition (good), Critical-per-iteration (worst).

mnemonics.title: Error Order
mnemonics.content: H-SQUARED: Trapezoidal error is O(h^2). Double n means half h means quarter error (2^2 = 4x better).
